channel.title: Resumes on QiMington's
channel.description: Recent content in Resumes on QiMington's

item.title: Resume
item.description: #embed-pdf-container { position: relative; width: 100%; height: auto; min-height: 20vh; } .pdf-canvas { border: 1px solid black; direction: ltr; width: 100%; height: auto; display: none; } #the-canvas { border: 1px solid black; direction: ltr; width: 100%; height: auto; display: none; } .pdf-loadingWrapper { display: none; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 350px; } .pdf-loading { display: inline-block; width: 50px; height: 50px; border: 3px solid #d2d0d0;; border-radius: 50%; border-top-color: #383838; animation: spin 1s ease-in-out infinite; -webkit-animation: spin 1s ease-in-out infinite; } .

item.title: 个人简历
item.description: #embed-pdf-container { position: relative; width: 100%; height: auto; min-height: 20vh; } .pdf-canvas { border: 1px solid black; direction: ltr; width: 100%; height: auto; display: none; } #the-canvas { border: 1px solid black; direction: ltr; width: 100%; height: auto; display: none; } .pdf-loadingWrapper { display: none; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 350px; } .pdf-loading { display: inline-block; width: 50px; height: 50px; border: 3px solid #d2d0d0;; border-radius: 50%; border-top-color: #383838; animation: spin 1s ease-in-out infinite; -webkit-animation: spin 1s ease-in-out infinite; } .
